title: Charitable trusts need not have ‘irrevocable’ clause in trust deed for tax registration: Bombay High Court
description: The Bombay High Court has held that charitable trusts in Maharashtra cannot be denied income tax registration or renewal merely because their trust deeds do not contain an “irrevocability” clause to expressly indicate that their property will irrevocably remain dedicated to charitable purposes [The Chamber of Tax Consultants & Ors. v. Commissioner of Income Tax (Exemptions) & Ors].On an examination of the relevant laws, a Division Bench of Justices BP Colabawalla and Firdosh P Pooniwalla
